headline: Affiliated Managers Group, Credit Acceptance, Ally Financial, Synchrony Financial, and Capital One Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the release of a surprisingly weak February jobs report showed an unexpected drop in employment.

headline: 'E-shaped' economy is replacing a K-shaped one in 2026, economist says: The middle class is 'spending in a nervous way' now
summary: Economist Heather Long says the U.S. economy is diverging into three tiers of consumer behavior instead of two, amid an ongoing affordability crisis.
